title: Telefónica despega en Bolsa: esto es lo que opinan los analistas
summary: Los inversores han recibido hoy los resultados de Telefónica con compras. La acción ha subido un 5,79%, su mayor alza desde 2021, lo que le permite recuperar los 4 euros perdidos el pasado noviembre. title: El Ibex vuelve a las caídas con el nuevo repunte del petróleo
summary: El Ibex 35 parte este viernes desde los 17.809 puntos, tras revalorizarse ayer un 0,87%. Leer

title: El revés a los bonos, el "verdadero riesgo" para la Bolsa
summary: La escalada en los intereses de la deuda acapara por momentos más advertencias entre las firmas de análisis que el rally del petróleo. En la coyuntura actual los analistas sugieren que el aumento en los costes de financiación supone "el verdadero riesgo" para la Bolsa. Leer

title: Xi Jinping asegura a los CEO de Nvidia, Tesla y Apple que China "se abrirá aún más"
summary: Los máximos responsables de las grandes tecnológicas destacan la "gran importancia" del mercado chino durante su visita a Pekín junto a Donald Trump. Leer

title: Seven proven ways to help you meet new people in Spain
summary: The challenge of moving to a new country, or even a new city, is how to make new friends and connections. Here are some of the best ways to meet people in Spain.

title: 'Thank you, Tenerife': WHO chief praises Spanish island in hantavirus fight
summary: The head of the World Health Organisation on Thursday published an open letter thanking the people of Tenerife for showing "moral courage" in accepting to help those aboard a cruise ship hit by a deadly hantavirus outbreak to evacuate.

title: Spain's PM faces key Andalusia vote after series of defeats
summary: Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez's Socialists seek to avoid a drubbing in the key region of Andalusia on Sunday, following a string of electoral losses ahead of next year's national vote.

title: Spain's PM 'proud' of Barça's Yamal in Palestinian flag row
summary: Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez on Thursday said Barcelona star Lamine Yamal had made Spain "proud" for waving a Palestinian flag at a victory parade that sparked Israeli accusations of "inciting hatred".

title: Spain arrests top UK fugitive in Benidorm drug bust
summary: Spanish police on Thursday said they had arrested one of Britain's most-wanted fugitives after snuffing out a drug trafficking and forgery group concealed in the famed beach resort of Benidorm.

title: Why are TV ad breaks so long in Spain?
summary: Watching Spanish TV can often feel like it's all just ads, and the actual programmes are the fillers. Why is it that ad breaks in Spain often run for more than 12 minutes?

title: Q&A: Who will win Andalusia's elections and why does it matter for Spain?
summary: Voters in Spain's most populous region are set to head to the polls this weekend. But who's running, what do the polls say, and what could the results of Andalusia's regional election mean for national politics?

title: Myth-buster: Have schools in Spain banned pork and introduced halal menus?
summary: Several posts circling online claim that Spain will soon introduce halal menus in its school canteens. Is there any truth to this?
